_SEARCH_FLOW_DELTA_VS_BROWARD: Brevard AcclaimWeb does NOT use Broward's single-POST SearchByName + HTML-grid-scrape. It is a THREE-STEP chain ending in a JSON grid endpoint. The shared acclaimweb_http_adapter.perform_search() (single POST + HTML scrape) returns EMPTY for Brevard. Wave-2 engineering task: add a search_flow='three_step_json' branch (or a Brevard subclass). All steps verified pure-HTTP 2026-06-10 (no Cloudflare, no anti-forgery token).

step1_name_resolution.returns: telerik treeview fragment of indexed name matches

step2_prename_commit.returns: 87KB results-shell page (grid config embedded, rows ajax-bound)

doc_image_url_pattern._DELTA_VS_BROWARD: record_type=3 (Official Records book type), NOT Broward's 27. transaction token (hdnTransactionItemId) is the numeric TransactionItemId echoed by the GridResults JSON — can be passed directly from the search result without re-parsing the jump page. Image/Atala/WebAtalaCache flow is otherwise identical to Broward; verified end-to-end on instrument 1996067410 -> 103KB valid PDF on 2026-06-10.

apn_source: BCPAO property appraiser anchor (recorder detail does not reliably expose Parcel ID; use phase1_property_appraiser.json)
notes: Brevard County FL Clerk of Court — Harris AcclaimWeb (Telerik MVC 2012.1.214), portal vaclmweb1.brevardclerk.us. Probed live 2026-06-10 for case Brevard_LEWIS_v1 (Angela D. Lewis, 977 Hammacher Ave SW, Palm Bay 32908). KEY DELTAS vs Broward: (1) NO Cloudflare/anti-bot — plain 200 on first GET, no cf_clearance needed; (2) NO __RequestVerificationToken; (3) three-step search chain (SearchTypeName -> SearchTypePreName -> GridResults JSON) instead of single-POST+HTML; (4) DocTypes is NUMERIC (DEED=80) not literal 'DEED'; (5) BookTypes NUMERIC (OR=3) required; (6) IsParsedName='False' required or step-1 errors; (7) party vocab Both/Direct/Reverse (Direct=grantor index, Reverse=grantee index); (8) results are JSON not HTML rows; (9) JumpToInstrumentNumber record_type=3 not 27. Index reaches back to 1/1/1981. Verified vesting deed for LEWIS: instr 1996067410, Brooking,Steve -> Lewis,Angela D, OR 3563/2270, $66,500, legal 'LT 16 BLK 1633 PB 17 PG 34 PORT MALABAR UNIT 32 S 12 T 29 R 36'. Wave-2: implement search_flow='three_step_json' branch in acclaimweb_http_adapter (or Brevard subclass); registry currently routes to platform 'acclaimweb_http' which honors the disclaimer + Atala download flow but NOT yet the 3-step JSON search. stub:true until first live e2e.
